title: bastardia bivalvis var. aristata
intro: Bastardia bivalvis var. aristata, also known as Aristata, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Bastardia bivalvis var. aristata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
